design_philosophy: Digital HQ. Premium, minimal, elegant. Vercel/Linear quality but original. Emphasize noise overlays, glassmorphism only where appropriate, and a subtle technical grid. Tension through typography and high contrast.

typography.rules: Headings MUST use tracking-tight or tracking-tighter. Never use Inter or Roboto. Use fluid scaling for headings (max text-6xl for Hero). Overlines and Badges must be Mono, uppercase, with tracking-widest.

colors.gradients: Soft ambient mesh gradients powered by CSS (Amber, Slate, Charcoal). PROHIBITED: Purple/Teal/Blue gradients.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous spacing. Use p-8 to p-12 for bento grid cards. Container gaps gap-6 to gap-8.
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Bento Grid protocol for platform overview. 'Control Room' dense grid for Developer Resources & Cyber News.
layout_and_spacing.structural_lines: Subtle 1px border lines globally to create an underlying technical grid.

components.navigation: Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 (dark) or bg-white/70 (light) with 1px delicate inner stroke border-white/10. Sticky top.
components.buttons: Flat solid background with 1px subtle border. Hover state MUST explicitly define higher contrast and slight lift (-translate-y-1).
components.cards: Neumorphic/Glass hybrid. 1px border. Hover effect: 'Tracing Beam' or soft glow.
components.badges: For 'Coming Soon/Beta/Planned': Pill-shaped, Mono font, text-xs, with a soft glowing status dot.
components.cyber_news: List layout. Skeleton loading states must be built with framer-motion pulse. High contrast typography.
components.forms: Use highly customized Shadcn components (Input, Textarea) with transparent backgrounds, bottom-borders, or stark 1px solid borders.
components.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute.

motion_and_interaction.page_transitions: Framer Motion opacity and slight y-axis translation (e.g., y: 20 -> 0).
motion_and_interaction.scroll: Smooth scrolling via lenis is MANDATORY.
motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Transition colors and add subtle drop-shadows on all interactables.

icons: lucide-react for basic UI primitives. iconoir-react for sophisticated line icons.

media.textures: CSS-based SVG noise overlay is REQUIRED globally (pointer-events: none, opacity: 0.03 for light, 0.05 for dark).

image_urls.description: Warm orange orb on blue gradient. Use with extreme blur and low opacity behind the noise overlay as a fallback if CSS mesh gradients are too complex.
Teal LED panel. Use as an article thumbnail or header image in the Cyber News section.
Contemporary tech office setup. Use in the About or Join Team sections.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the UI strictly with Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, and raw HTML structural elements.
Implement a robust Dark/Light mode toggle that switches Tailwind's 'dark' class on the document element.
Create a global noise overlay using a fixed, pointer-events-none SVG pattern.
For the Future Tools page, use the Bento Grid layout protocol.
Cyber News page must have framer-motion powered skeleton loaders and fetch mock/live ethical hacking news.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, links, and forms.
Install iconoir-react via yarn add iconoir-react.
Install framer-motion via yarn add framer-motion.
Do not use default generic fonts for headings; explicitly use Satoshi and configure it in Tailwind.
